description: A field survey team needs all project GIS data consolidated into a single GeoPackage (.gpkg) file for their mobile mapping application. Consolidate the polygon zones (/home/ga/GIS_Data/sample_polygon.geojson), monitoring stations (/home/ga/GIS_Data/sample_points.geojson), and road network (/home/ga/GIS_Data/sample_lines.geojson) into a single GeoPackage file at /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/project_data.gpkg. The layers within the GeoPackage must be named 'zones', 'stations', and 'roads' respectively. Save the QGIS project to /home/ga/GIS_Data/projects/delivery_project.qgs.
